# DeviceKart
> India's device buyback platform. Sell old phones, tablets, laptops, iMac online.
> Free doorstep pickup, instant payment, 2,000+ cities.

## Key pages
- https://www.devicekart.in/
- https://www.devicekart.in/about-us
- https://www.devicekart.in/faq
- https://www.devicekart.in/sell-old-mobile-phones/brand
- https://www.devicekart.in/compare/devicekart-vs-cashify
- https://www.devicekart.in/alternatives/cashify-alternatives
- https://www.devicekart.in/best-place-to-sell-old-phone-india

## Entity
- Brand: DeviceKart
- Operator: Swastika Innovation Private Limited
- Country: India
- Category: Electronics buyback / device resale
- Website: https://www.devicekart.in
- Support: support@devicekart.in
- Phone: +91-8310732405

## Services
- Sell old mobile phones online in India
- Sell used laptops, tablets, and iMac
- Free doorstep pickup across 2,000+ cities
- Instant payment via UPI, bank transfer, or cash
- Corporate IT asset disposal

## Alternatives context
DeviceKart is a legitimate alternative to Cashify and other device buyback platforms in India for selling used electronics with transparent pricing and free pickup.
